expectations.text: DashboardLayout이 folder 기반 index.tsx 패턴으로 정리된다
expectations.evidence: dashboardLayout/index.tsx exists along with sub-component folders (header/index.tsx, sidebar/index.tsx, mobileNav/index.tsx)
No flat DashboardLayout.tsx file found in outputs directory; only the folder-based structure exists
Dedicated sidebar/index.tsx with <aside> element and data-testid='dashboard-sidebar'; imported and rendered in main index.tsx
Dedicated header/index.tsx with <header> element and data-testid='dashboard-header'; imported and rendered in main index.tsx
<main> element with data-testid='dashboard-main' and className='flex-1 overflow-y-auto ...' renders {children}
DashboardLayout accepts children: ReactNode prop and renders {children} inside <main>; interface DashboardLayoutProps includes children
Multiple responsive classes used: md:flex, md:w-60, lg:w-64, md:px-6, md:pb-6, lg:px-8, md:hidden, md:block across components

expectations.text: 사용처 import가 새 경로에 맞게 정리된다
expectations.evidence: dashboard/page.tsx는 원래 DashboardLayout을 import하지 않아 업데이트 대상 없음. 내부 sub-component import(./header, ./sidebar, ./mobileNav)는 정상 반영됨.

expectations.text: useEffect, fetch, axios, useQuery, useMutation 호출이 없다
expectations.evidence: Grep for useEffect|fetch(|axios|useQuery|useMutation across all output files returned no matches

expectations.text: 모든 컴포넌트가 const 화살표 함수로 선언된다
expectations.evidence: All components use arrow function style: const DashboardLayout = (...) =>, const Header = (...) =>, const Sidebar = (...) =>, const MobileNav = (...) =>. No 'function' keyword declarations found.
Folder path is components/dashboard/dashboardLayout/ (camelCase). Sub-folders also camelCase: header, sidebar, mobileNav
Task notification confirms: 'tcp validate-file passes all 4 files with 0 violations (4/4 passed).'
